runs.note: Added scrypt support with transparent rehashing on login. New registrations and password changes use scrypt with 10-char minimum. Existing MD5 users can still login and are transparently migrated to scrypt.

runs.note: Added scrypt hashing support, implemented transparent rehashing on MD5 login, updated password minimums (10 chars for new/changed passwords only), and ensured both MD5 and scrypt formats are handled correctly during the migration period.
